name: French Country Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor with the metal blade attachment, grind together the almonds and sugar until finely combined.
2. Add the softened margarine to the food processor and process until well incorporated.
3. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing gently after each addition until fully combined.
4. Stir in the almond extract.
5. Blend in the flour until smooth.
6. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
7. Spoon the filling mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
8. Peel and slice the apples.
9. Arrange the apple slices over the almond filling.
10. Bake the pie for 50-60 minutes, or until the center is set and the crust is golden brown.
